sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28630" key="dusai/aktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-αίακτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28630.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">most mournful, miserable</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0527.tlg025:6:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
